title: schizoloma lobatum var. malabaricum
intro: Schizoloma lobatum var. malabaricum, a lesser-known variety of the Schizoloma lobatum plant, is a type of fern species commonly found in tropical regions. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Schizoloma lobatum var. malabaricum include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which help to reduce inflammation and facilitate the removal of mucus from the lungs. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of this plant are often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
